_comment: Canonical official / authoritative source links for the data provenance hierarchy in doc 14. Community sources are intentionally excluded here; they belong in per-build source_links with clear labeling.

sources.label: GGG PoE2 passive skill tree export
sources.notes: Primary source for passive node ids used by .build export and passive milestones.

sources.label: Path of Exile 2 official site
sources.notes: Official product and news landing page.

sources.label: Official PoE2 patch notes forum
sources.notes: Authoritative patch notes and hotfix threads. Check first during patch windows.

sources.label: Official in-game Build Planner / .build file format
sources.notes: Authoritative .build JSON schema (Version 1, Experimental): name, author, ascendancy code, passives by semantic node id, skills/supports by metadata id, inventory_slots by slot id + free-text. scripts/export_build_files.py targets this format.

sources.label: Official GGG developer data exports
sources.notes: Confirms the ONLY official PoE2 data exports are the passive (and atlas) trees. There is no official skill-gem, support-gem, or base-item export; those ids would require community game-file extraction and are intentionally kept TBD.
